prompt:
Reference image role: the previous project covers define the style — dark ink-green base, glowing tech motif, restrained Eastern xianxia + tech fusion. Same color palette and mood.

Create a 16:9 project cover image for "PyTorch Dispatcher 调度机制大全". NO text, NO logos.

Subject: A glowing bonsai-tree-like dispatch graph — a single golden trunk in the center splitting into many fine branching paths upward, each branch ending in a small luminous node, suggesting routing/dispatching. Subtle hexagonal or runic overlay etched in the background. Some branches dim, some brightly lit, hinting at active dispatch paths.

Composition: tree subject center-right 60%, left quiet for text. Cinematic, professional.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, glow #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D, jade #6A9580.

Avoid: company logos, readable text, characters, neon purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG, real plant photograph.
